description: settlement slot exists but the adapted settlement rows array is empty, so the group returns no rows and no issues

files.description: Adapter produced an empty settlement rows array. Current contract-safe behavior is an empty successful result with no issues.

notes: This fixture documents the current empty-input boundary instead of silently leaving it untested.
No blocking issue is emitted because required-column validation only applies when rows are present.
If future contract policy changes, this fixture should be updated deliberately.
